name: Nicotinamide riboside arterial stiffness registry
summary: Recruiting phase 2 registry testing NR for elevated systolic blood pressure and arterial stiffness in middle-aged and older adults, with no posted results.
population: Middle-aged and older adults with elevated systolic blood pressure and arterial stiffness

trial_details.expected_results_window: Estimated completion was Jun. 1, 2025, but the registry still listed recruiting and no posted results in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is vascular-function NR trial-watch context and needs status/result surveillance.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
